name: Apple Cheddar Muffins
recipeInstructions:
You should have 12 to 15 thin slices of unpeeled red apple for this recipe.
Preheat the oven to 400°F. Cream the shortening and sugar together until smooth. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a mixing bowl; mix lightly. Gradually stir the flour mixture into the shortening mixture. In this order, add the oats, cheddar cheese, and pecans, mixing well after each addition. Gradually add the milk, stirring until all ingredients are just moistened. Grease muffin pans and fill each cup about 2/3 full with batter. Dip apple slices in melted butter, then into cinnamon-sugar mix. Press 1 apple slice into the top of each muffin. Sprinkle lightly with cinnamon-sugar. Bake for 25 minutes in the preheated oven, or until golden brown.
